queries.question: What're the locations of all hospitals?
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?city WHERE {
  ?hospitals a :Hospitals .
  ?hospitals p:city ?city .
}

queries.question: Show me what city and state St. Mary's General hospital is in.
queries.sql: SELECT city, state FROM Hospitals WHERE NAME = "St. Mary's General";
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?city ?state WHERE {
  ?hospitals a :Hospitals .
  ?hospitals p:city ?city .
  ?hospitals p:state ?state .
  ?hospitals p:name ?name_f .
  FILTER(STR(?name_f) = STR("St. Mary's General"))
}

queries.question: Show me what state St. Mary's General hospital is in.
queries.sql: SELECT state FROM Hospitals WHERE NAME = "St. Mary's General";
queries.sparql:
